artifact_refs.description: Manual official-only notebook used to author the Mercedes TC1 human baseline.
Run-level metadata for the canonical Mercedes human baseline.
Maps each predicted bank action to the supporting notebook section.
Author notes for the Mercedes human baseline.

notes: True bank-id authoring for tc1_from_scratch using an official-only repo-local notebook. The baseline selects the conservative primary spine plus one explicit scaling branch, one PCA projection branch, and one RFECV-style feature-selection branch.
